section.title: Database Settings
section.p: The following parameters control the database connection.

dlentry.dd: Full connection string in the format postgresql://user:pass@host/db.
Maximum number of connections in the pool. Default: 10.

section.title: Authentication Settings
section.p: Parameters that control session and token behaviour.

dlentry.dd: Secret used to sign JWT tokens. Must be at least 32 characters.
How long an access token remains valid. Default: 60.
